nasb.text: But if you say, “What are we going to eat on the seventh year if we do not sow or gather in our crops?”

esv.text: And if you say, ‘What shall we eat in the seventh year, if we may not sow or gather in our crop?’

cnv.text: 如果你們問：在第七年我們不耕種，也不收藏我們的出產，我們吃甚麼呢？

ccb.text: 你们可能会问，‘第七年不种不收，我们吃什么？’
